project.name: Hero Section 动态效果
project.designRead: showcase landing hero / general audience / bold warm energy / low density / avoid purple neon AI hero
project.styleDefinitionBrief: Bold orange hero with character right-aligned, animated counter and text shuffle effects inspired by React Bits interactive components, warm energetic palette.

pages.title: Hero Section
pages.visualNorthStar: A bold, energetic orange hero with the character confidently positioned on the right, animated numbers ticking up and text cycling through variations — feels alive and dynamic, like a React Bits interactive showcase.

assets.semanticDescription: Confident professional person, studio photography, orange-toned lighting
